gist.headline: Studio time
gist.blurb: MUSINGWEI STUDIO just dropped into the community greenhouse. It's a neat little hub for spinning up images, audio, and video using our APIs.
gist.summary: Added MUSINGWEI STUDIO to the community app showcase, highlighting its integration with our image, audio, and video generation APIs.
gist.impact: The community showcase now features another excellent example of building full-stack multimedia apps on top of Pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a multimedia studio app to the showcase. Visuals should represent a cozy creative studio with video and audio gear. Polly the bee acting as a director or creator, perhaps alongside the Monitor Robot acting as the studio equipment.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret in a retro multimedia studio. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head displays a colorful video timeline while holding a tiny microphone. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
